content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(5, 6, 0), (4, 5, 4), (1, 9, 5), (2, 3, 5), (0, 6, 8), (0, 1, 10), (0, 9, 12), (4, 6, 12), (0, 3, 13), (2, 7, 17), (0, 7, 18), (3, 8, 18), (5, 7, 18)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 8.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 8:

* Edge (0, 6, 8) has node 0 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 1, 10) has node 0 and time 10. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 9, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 6, 12) has node 4 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 3, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 7, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 7, 18) has node 0 and time 18. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 8, 18) has node 3 and time 18. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 7, 18) has node 5 and time 18. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 3, 6, 7, and 8.

Answer: [3, 6, 7, 8]
